data.title: Add --status filter argument to sprint-drift-check.sh
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Add --status=<status> optional argument to sprint-drift-check.sh argument parser. When provided, filter the children list (from ticket list --parent=<epic-id>) to only include children matching the given status before processing for drift detection. When not provided, process all children (existing behavior unchanged).

Implementation:
- Add --status=* case to the for-arg loop (lines 32-52)
- After fetching children_json (line 173), filter via python3 to exclude non-matching statuses
- Validate that --status value is one of: open, in_progress, closed (exit 2 for invalid values)

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-drift-check.sh (Edit)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script accepts --status=open without error
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-drift-check.sh
- [ ] All tests pass including new --status filter tests from Task 1
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh
- [ ] Script still works without --status (backward compat)
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-drift-check.sh
